---
title: "Table 7 Lab: Field Dataset Cleaning - Solutions"
format: html
editor: source
author: "Ansita Agrawal, Sage Kruleski, Auster Zhang"
embed-resources: true
code-tools: true
echo: true #always show code
error: true #keep rendering even if errors occur
---

## Preamble

## Load appropriate libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Loading in files
```{r}
v1 <- read_csv("clean_p_regilla_V1_field_data.csv")
v2 <- read_csv("clean_p_regilla_V2_field_data.csv")
```

## Cleaning column headers
```{r}
v1 <- v1 |>
  rename_with(str_to_camel)
v2 <- v2 |>
  rename_with(str_to_camel)
```

```{r}
v1 <- v1 |>
  mutate(latitudeManualGps = as.double(latitudeManualGps),
         waterTemperatureC = as.double(waterTemperatureC))
```

## Creating full dataset
```{r}
full <- v2 |>
  full_join(v1, by = join_by(
      globalId, island, site, latitudeManualGps, longitudeManualGps, elevationM,
      sex, totalMassG, bagMassG, waterTemperatureC, x, y,
      collectionDateAndTime == creationDate, 
      sulMm == svlMm, 
      animalMassG == animalWeight, 
      airTemperatureC == airTemperatureC44,
      substrateType == substrate
    )
  )
```


#Question 8 - make a map
```{r}
#required packages
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("auk")
library(auk)
#install.packages("rebird")
library(rebird)
#install.packages("sf")
library(sf)
#install.packages("terrainr")
library(terrainr)
```

```{r}

full |> 
  filter(x != 0, y != 0)

frog_geo <- st_as_sf(full,coords=c(x = "x", y = "y"),crs="WGS84") #Converts a regular dataframe → sf (simple features) object

frog_geo_buf <- frog_geo |> st_buffer(dist = 5000)

frog_tiles <- get_tiles(frog_geo_buf, services = "USGSTopo", resolution = 200) #Downloads map imagery (tiles) for your spatial extent

ggplot() +
  geom_spatial_rgb(data = frog_tiles$USGSTopo, mapping = aes(x, y, r = red, g = green, b = blue)) +
  geom_sf(data = frog_geo, alpha = .75) +
  labs(title = "xxx", 
       caption="yyy")


```
